post.description: Creates a new user account with the provided details.
Authenticates a user with email and password, returning a JWT token.
Sends a password reset OTP to the user's email.

patch.description: Resets the user's password using a valid OTP.

get.description: Retrieves a list of users with optional filtering.

parameters.name: role
parameters.description: Filter users by role IDs (comma-separated or array)

parameters.name: department
parameters.description: Filter users by department IDs (comma-separated or array)

parameters.name: designation
parameters.description: Filter users by designation IDs (comma-separated or array)

get.description: Retrieves details of a specific user.
Retrieves the profile of the authenticated user.

patch.description: Updates the authenticated user's name and/or avatar.

post.description: Creates a new user role in the system.

get.description: Retrieves a list of user roles with optional filtering.
Retrieves details of a specific user role.

patch.description: Updates an existing user role's details.

delete.description: Deletes a user role by its ID.

post.description: Creates a new department in the organization.

get.description: Retrieves a list of departments with optional filtering.
Retrieves details of a specific department.

delete.description: Deletes a department by its ID.

post.description: Marks the authenticated user as present.

get.description: Retrieves attendance records for the authenticated user.

parameters.name: month
parameters.description: The month for which to retrieve attendance records (1-12)

parameters.name: year
parameters.description: The year for which to retrieve attendance records

post.description: Marks the authenticated user as out for the day.
Creates a new job designation in the organization.

get.description: Retrieves a list of job designations with optional filtering.
Retrieves details of a specific job designation.

patch.description: Updates an existing job designation's details.

delete.description: Deletes a job designation by its ID.

get.description: Retrieves multiple designations by their IDs.
